What is Comparable Company Analysis?
Comparable Company Analysis (CCA) is one of the most common ways to evaluate a
company’s position in the market. The process involves searching for similar, publicly-traded
companies that resemble your acquisition target.
A CCA allows you to compare the business to competing public companies and other
purchase transactions of similar location, industry, size, etc… This analysis operates under
the assumption that similar companies in the same industry have similar value.
Once this research is done you should be able to establish average Multiples for the group of
comparable companies.
How Do I Find Comparable Companies?
There are various free sites that let you search for stock tickers matching certain filters.
We’ve listed several of our favorite tools below for your use.
Wallmine
Yahoo Finance Screener
Finvix Screener
TradingView
MarketWatch Stock Screener
Investing.com Stock Screener
Zacks
Comparable Company Analysis Guide
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

3 Steps to Completing Comparable Company Analysis
Step 1:
Identify publicly-traded companies that most closely resemble your acquisition target; you’ll
want to narrow your search to around 5-10 similar companies
The best companies to compare should have similar:
• 	Geography
• 	Industry
• 	Financial “size”
Step 2:
Find the multiple for each business by dividing the company’s Enterprise Value (EV) by it’s
EBITDA
Note: You can find any public company’s EV and EBITDA, or its multiple, on Yahoo
Finance by searching the company and viewing the “statistics” tab.
Source: Yahoo Finance
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Step 3:
Determine the average multiple of the group of companies and multiply it by your acquisition
target’s Adjusted EBITDA
Market Value = (Average Multiple) x (Adjusted EBITDA)
Additional Tools
There are paid tools that allow you to view financial information or perform competitive
analysis on many private companies. While using any of these tools is not necessary to
properly perform Comparable Company Analysis, some of these tools are provided below
that may enhance the process. Please note: you should contact vendors to verify they
have the information you need before paying for any service.
PrivCo 	ZoomInfo 	Adapt
Semrush 	S&P Global Market Intel 	Data Feed by FactSet
PitchBook
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
